vocabulary.example_sentence: Earth is the planet we live on.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 地球是我们居住的行星。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Astronauts took beautiful photos of Earth from space.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 宇航员从太空拍摄了地球的美丽照片。

vocabulary.example_sentence: At night the sky is full of stars.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 夜晚的天空布满星星。

vocabulary.example_sentence: We can sometimes see the Moon even in the daytime.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 有时白天也能看到月亮。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Thick clouds covered the sky before the rain.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 下雨前厚厚的云遮住了天空。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The rover sent back new photos of the Moon.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 探测器传回了月球的新照片。

vocabulary.example_sentence: A telescope helps you see a star more clearly.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 望远镜能帮你更清楚地看到星星。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Humans have travelled into space many times.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 人类已经多次进入太空旅行。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Satellites move around Earth in outer space.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 卫星在外层空间绕地球运行。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Chinese taikonauts work on the space station.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 中国航天员在空间站工作。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Most of Earth's surface is covered by ocean.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 地球表面大部分被海洋覆盖。

vocabulary.example_sentence: He compared Mars to a red marble in his science report.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 他在科学报告里把火星比作一颗红色弹子。

vocabulary.example_sentence: This satellite sends signals back to Earth.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 这颗人造卫星向地球发回信号。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Scientists studied soil samples from Mars.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 科学家研究了来自火星的土壤样本。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The rover landed safely on Mars.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 探测器安全降落在火星上。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The story is about an alien from another planet.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 这个故事讲的是来自另一颗行星的外星生物。

vocabulary.example_sentence: They watched the sunrise through the station window.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 他们透过空间站窗户观看了日出。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The Mars rover explored the red soil.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 火星探测器探索了红色的土壤。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The spaceship flew into outer space.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 宇宙飞船飞入了外太空。

vocabulary.example_sentence: We used a telescope to watch the stars last night.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们昨晚用望远镜观察星星。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The astronaut answered students' questions online.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 宇航员在线回答了学生的问题。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The taikonaut returned to Earth in a spaceship.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 航天员乘坐宇宙飞船返回地球。

vocabulary.example_sentence: He stayed on the space station for six months.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 他在空间站待了六个月。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The Chinese taikonaut showed us life in space.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 中国航天员向我们展示了太空生活。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Astronauts use a special cloth to clean the station.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 航天员用特殊的布清洁空间站。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Even a tube of toothpaste floats in space.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 在太空中连一管牙膏都会漂浮。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Do you have any questions about Mars?
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 你对火星有什么问题吗？

vocabulary.example_sentence: The sunset looked amazing from the space station.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 从空间站看日落美极了。

vocabulary.example_sentence: China has sent taikonauts into space many times.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 中国已经多次把航天员送入太空。
